_meta.mode: comparison (frozen <=T EDGAR + PIT fundamentals only; no open web, no live estimates)
_meta.scorer: LLM (Claude), reading the same as-of-T corpus engine B reads

rubric.B: earnings 2nd derivative: 0.0-0.3 still decelerating/no turn; 0.4-0.6 early/mixed; 0.7-0.9 clear sequential accel + margin trough up (+ destocking)
rubric.C: narrative re-rating: 0.0-0.3 boilerplate only; 0.4-0.6 real but early/thin catalyst; 0.7-0.9 material new TAM/design-win/governance catalyst evident in filings
rubric.trap_risk: 0.0-0.3 survivable/cyclical; 0.4-0.6 elevated; 0.7-1.0 structural decline / cash-burn / liquidity (ineligible above ceiling 0.70)

honesty: Memorization-contaminated UPPER BOUND: the model knows these outcomes. Treat as a discrimination probe, not generalizable accuracy.
A/B/C/trap rubric applied to as-of-T evidence; A-gate, momentum, control arm, D-formula and metric defs are SHARED with engine B (only B/C/trap judgment is swapped).
Where the dump programmatically extracted only the earnings 8-K, C reflects the analyst's reading of the concurrent <=T 10-Q/10-K MD&A (same corpus, subject to recall).
